'''Tavares''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and an [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] who served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was part of a group of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officers who were present, along with [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], at a ceremony near the [[Kuat system/Legends|Kuat system]] where the [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] was officially commissioned.
